verses.geez: ወከመዝ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ሕጉ ፡ ለንስሓ ፡ ቅዱስ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ለቅዱሳን ።

translations.lxx: And this is the law of the ram for the trespass-offering; it is most holy.
translations.kjv: Likewise this is the law of the trespass offering: it is most holy.

verses.geez:
ውስተ ፡ መካን ፡ ኀበ ፡ ይጠብሑ ፡ ዘመሥዋዕት ፡ በህየ ፡ ይጠብሕዎ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ በግዕ ፡ ዘንስሓ ፡ ወይክዕዉ ፡ ደሞ ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ ምንባረ ፡ ምሥዋዕ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዐውዱ ።

translations.lxx: In the place where they slay the whole-burnt-offering, they shall slay the ram of the trespass-offering before the Lord, and he shall pour out the blood at the bottom of the altar round about.
translations.kjv: In the place where they kill the burnt offering shall they kill the trespass offering: and the blood thereof shall he sprinkle round about upon the altar.

verses.geez:
ወኵሎ ፡ ሥብሖ ፡ ያወጽእ ፡ እምኔሁ ፡ ወሐቌሁኒ ፡ ወሥብሖ ፡ ዘይከድን ፡ ንዋየ ፡ ውስጡ ፡ ወሥብሖ ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ አማዑቱ
                  ፤

translations.lxx: And he shall offer all the fat from it; and the loins, and all the fat that covers the inwards, and all the fat that is upon the inwards,
translations.kjv: And he shall offer of it all the fat thereof; the rump, and the fat that covereth the inwards,

verses.geez:
ወክልኤሆን ፡ ኵለያቲሁ ፡ ወሥብሐ ፡ ዘላዕሌሆን ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ ፀራዒቲሁ ፡ ወከብዶ ፡ እንተ ፡ ትንእስ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ኵለያቲሁ
                  ፡ ይመትሮ ።

translations.lxx: and the two kidneys, and the fat that is upon them, that which is upon the thighs, and the caul upon the liver with the kidneys, he shall take them away.
translations.kjv: And the two kidneys, and the fat that is on them, which is by the flanks, and the caul that is above the liver, with the kidneys, it shall he take away:

verses.geez:
ወይወድዮ ፡ ካህን ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምሥዋዕ ፤ ቍርባን ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ዘመዐዛ ፡ ሠናይ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ዘበእንተ ፡ ንስሓ ፡
                  ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall offer them on the altar a burnt-offering to the Lord; it is for trespass.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall burn them upon the altar for an offering made by fire unto the LORD: it is a trespass offering.

verses.geez: ኵሉ ፡ ተባዕት ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ካህናት ፡ ይበልዖ ፡ በመካን ፡ ቅዱስ ፡ ይበልዕዎ ፤

translations.lxx: Every male of the priests shall eat them, in the holy place they shall eat them: they are most holy.
translations.kjv: Every male among the priests shall eat thereof: it shall be eaten in the holy place: it is most holy.

verses.geez: ቅዱስ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ለቅዱሳን ።

translations.lxx: As the sin-offering, so also is the trespass-offering. There is one law of them; the priest who shall make atonement with it, his it shall be.
translations.kjv: As the sin offering is, so is the trespass offering: there is one law for them: the priest that maketh atonement therewith shall have it.

verses.geez:
በከመ ፡ ዘበእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ፡ ከማሁ ፡ ዘበእንተ ፡ ንስሓ ፤ አሐዱ ፡ ሕጎሙ ፡ ለካህን ፡ ዘያስተሰሪ ፡ በእንቲአሆሙ ፡
                  ሎቱ ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: And as for the priest who offers a man's whole-burnt-offering, the skin of the whole-burnt-offering which he offers, shall be his.
translations.kjv: And the priest that offereth any man’s burnt offering, even the priest shall have to himself the skin of the burnt offering which he hath offered.

verses.geez: ወካህን ፡ ዘያበውእ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ ሰብእ ፡ ማእሰ ፡ መሥዋዕቱ ፡ ዘውእቱ ፡ ሦዐ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: And every sacrifice which shall be prepared in the oven, and every one which shall be prepared on the hearth, or on a frying-pan, it is the property of the priest that offers it; it shall be his.
translations.kjv: And all the meat offering that is baken in the oven, and all that is dressed in the fryingpan, and in the pan, shall be the priest’s that offereth it.

verses.geez: ወኵሉ ፡ መሥዋዕት ፡ ዘግቡር ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ አሮን ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ዕሩይ ፡ ለለ ፡ አሐዱ ።

translations.lxx: And every sacrifice made up with oil, or not made up with oil, shall belong to the sons of Aaron, an equal portion to each.
translations.kjv: And every meat offering, mingled with oil, and dry, shall all the sons of Aaron have, one as much as another.

verses.geez: ከመዝ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ሕገ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ መድኀኒት ፡ ዘያመጽኡ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: This is the law of the sacrifice of peace-offering, which they shall bring to the Lord.
translations.kjv: And this is the law of the sacrifice of peace offerings, which he shall offer unto the LORD.

verses.geez:
ወለእመ ፡ በእንተ ፡ አኰቴት ፡ አምጽኦ ፡ ያመጽእ ፡ ውስተ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ አኰቴት ፡ ኅብስተ ፡ ስንዳሌ ፡ ዘግቡር ፡
                  በቅብእ ፡ ወጸራይቀ ፡ ናእተ ፡ ዘቅቡእ ፡ በቅብእ ፡ ወስንዳሌ ፡ ዘልውስ ፡ በቅብእ ።

translations.lxx: If a man should offer it for praise, then shall he bring, for the sacrifice of praise, loaves of fine flour made up with oil, and unleavened cakes anointed with oil, and fine flour kneaded with oil.
translations.kjv: If he offer it for a thanksgiving, then he shall offer with the sacrifice of thanksgiving unleavened cakes mingled with oil, and unleavened wafers anointed with oil, and cakes mingled with oil, of fine flour, fried.

verses.geez: ምስለ ፡ ኅብስት ፡ ዘብሑእ ፡ ያመጽእ ፡ ቍርባኖ ፡ ለመሥዋዕተ ፡ አኰቴት ፡ ዘመድኀኒቱ ።

translations.lxx: With leavened bread he shall offer his gifts, with the peace-offering of praise.
translations.kjv: Besides the cakes, he shall offer for his offering leavened bread with the sacrifice of thanksgiving of his peace offerings.

verses.geez:
ይወስድ ፡ እምኔሁ ፡ አሐደ ፡ እምኵሉ ፡ ቍርባኑ ፡ ሀብተ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለካህን ፡ ለዘይክዕዎ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ደመ ፡
                  መድኀኒት ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: And he shall bring one of all his gifts, a separate offering to the Lord: it shall belong to the priest who pours forth the blood of the peace-offering.
translations.kjv: And of it he shall offer one out of the whole oblation for an heave offering unto the LORD, and it shall be the priest’s that sprinkleth the blood of the peace offerings.

verses.geez:
ወሥጋኒ ፡ ዘመሥዋዕተ ፡ መድኀኒት ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወበዕለት ፡ ያመጽእዎ ፡ ይበልዕዎ ፡ ወአልቦ ፡ ዘያተርፉ ፡ እምኔሁ
                  ፡ ለነግህ ።

translations.lxx: And the flesh of the sacrifice of the peace-offering of praise shall be his, and it shall be eaten in the day in which it is offered: they shall not leave of it till the morning.
translations.kjv: And the flesh of the sacrifice of his peace offerings for thanksgiving shall be eaten the same day that it is offered; he shall not leave any of it until the morning.

verses.geez:
ወለእመሰ ፡ ዘብፅአት ፡ አው ፡ ዘበፈቃዱ ፡ ያበውእ ፡ ቍርባኖ ፡ በዕለተ ፡ አምጽአ ፡ መሥዋዕቶ ፡ ይበልዕዎ ፡ ወበሳኒታ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And if it be a vow, or he offer his gift of his own will, on whatsoever day he shall offer his sacrifice, it shall be eaten, and on the morrow.
translations.kjv: But if the sacrifice of his offering be a vow, or a voluntary offering, it shall be eaten the same day that he offereth his sacrifice: and on the morrow also the remainder of it shall be eaten:

verses.geez: ወእመቦ ፡ ዘተርፈ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ሥጋ ፡ መሥዋዕቱ ፡ እስከ ፡ ሣልስት ፡ ዕለት ፡ በእሳት ፡ ያውዕይዎ ።

translations.lxx: And that which is left of the flesh of the sacrifice till the third day, shall be consumed with fire.
translations.kjv: But the remainder of the flesh of the sacrifice on the third day shall be burnt with fire.

verses.geez:
ወእመሰ ፡ በልዑ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ሥጋ ፡ በሣልስት ፡ ዕለት ፡ ኢይትወከፎ ፡ ለዘ ፡ አብአ ፡ ወኢይትኈለቆ ፡ እስመ
                  ፡ ርኵስ ፡ ወነፍስ ፡ እንተ ፡ በልዐት ፡ እምኔሁ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ትነሥእ ፡ ኀጢአቶ ።

translations.lxx: And if he do at all eat of the flesh on the third day, it shall not be accepted for him that offers: it shall not be reckoned to him, it is pollution; and whatsoever soul shall eat of it, shall bear his iniquity.
translations.kjv: And if any of the flesh of the sacrifice of his peace offerings be eaten at all on the third day, it shall not be accepted, neither shall it be imputed unto him that offereth it: it shall be an abomination, and the soul that eateth of it shall bear his iniquity.

verses.geez:
ወሥጋኒ ፡ እምከመ ፡ ለከፈ ፡ እምኵሉ ፡ ርኩስ ፡ ኢይብልዕዎ ፡ በእሳት ፡ ያውዕይዎ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ንጹሕ ፡ ይብላዕ ፡
                  እምውስተ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ሥጋ ።

translations.lxx: And whatsoever flesh shall have touched any unclean thing, it shall not be eaten, it shall be consumed with fire; every one that is clean shall eat the flesh.
translations.kjv: And the flesh that toucheth any unclean thing shall not be eaten; it shall be burnt with fire: and as for the flesh, all that be clean shall eat thereof.

verses.geez:
ወነፍስ ፡ እንተ ፡ በልዐት ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ሥጋ ፡ ዘመሥዋዕተ ፡ መድኀኒት ፡ ዘእግዚአብሔር ፡ እንዘ ፡ ርኵሱ ፡
                  ላዕሌሁ ፡ ለትደምሰስ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ነፍስ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ሕዝባ ።

translations.lxx: And whatsoever soul shall eat of the flesh of the sacrifice of the peace-offering which is the Lord's, and his uncleanness be upon him, that soul shall perish from his people.
translations.kjv: But the soul that eateth of the flesh of the sacrifice of peace offerings, that pertain unto the LORD, having his uncleanness upon him, even that soul shall be cut off from his people.

verses.geez:
ወነፍስኒ ፡ እንተ ፡ ገሰሰት ፡ እምኵሉ ፡ ርኩስ ፡ አው ፡ እምርኵሰ ፡ ሰብእ ፡ አው ፡ ዘእንስሳ ፡ ዘኢኮነ ፡ ንጹሐ ፡
                  አው ፡ አምኵሉ ፡ ርኩስ ፡ ዘኢኮነ ፡ ንጹሐ ፡ ወበልዐ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ሥጋ ፡ ዘመሥዋዕተ ፡ መድኀኒት ፡ ዘእግዚአብሔር ፡
                  ለትደምሰስ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ነፍስ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ሕዝባ ።

translations.lxx: And whatsoever soul shall touch any unclean thing, either of the uncleanness of a man, or of unclean quadrupeds, or any unclean abominable thing, and shall eat of the flesh of the sacrifice of the peace-offering, which is the Lord's, that soul shall perish from his people.
translations.kjv: Moreover the soul that shall touch any unclean thing, as the uncleanness of man, or any unclean beast, or any abominable unclean thing, and eat of the flesh of the sacrifice of peace offerings, which pertain unto the LORD, even that soul shall be cut off from his people.

verses.geez: ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.geez: ንግሮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወበሎሙ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ሥብሐ ፡ ላህም ፡ ወዘበግዕ ፡ ወዘጠሊ ፡ ኢትብልዑ ።

translations.lxx: Speak to the children of Israel, saying, Ye shall eat no fat of oxen or sheep or goats.
translations.kjv: Speak unto the children of Israel, saying, Ye shall eat no manner of fat, of ox, or of sheep, or of goat.

verses.geez: ወኵሉ ፡ ሥብ[ሐ] ፡ ምውት ፡ ወዘብላዐ ፡ አርዌ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ ግ[ብ]ር ፡ ይኩንክሙ ፡ ወለበሊዕ ፡ ባሕቱ ፡ ኢይብልዕዎ ።

translations.lxx: And the fat of such animals as have died of themselves, or have been seized of beasts, may be employed for any work; but it shall not be eaten for food.
translations.kjv: And the fat of the beast that dieth of itself, and the fat of that which is torn with beasts, may be used in any other use: but ye shall in no wise eat of it.

verses.geez:
ኵሉ ፡ ዘበልዐ ፡ ሥብሐ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ዘያመጽኡ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ መራዕይ ፡ ለትደምሰስ ፡
                  ይእቲ ፡ ነፍስ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ሕዝባ ።

translations.lxx: Every one that eats fat off the beasts, from which he will bring a burnt-offering to the Lord—that soul shall perish from his people.
translations.kjv: For whosoever eateth the fat of the beast, of which men offer an offering made by fire unto the LORD, even the soul that eateth it shall be cut off from his people.

verses.geez: ኵሎ ፡ ደመ ፡ ኢትብልዑ ፡ በኵልሄ ፡ በኀበ ፡ ሀለውክሙ ፡ ኢዘእንስሳ ፡ ወኢዘአዕዋፍ ።

translations.lxx: Ye shall eat no blood in all your habitations, either of beasts or of birds.
translations.kjv: Moreover ye shall eat no manner of blood, whether it be of fowl or of beast, in any of your dwellings.

verses.geez: ኵሉ ፡ ነፍስ ፡ እንተ ፡ በልዐት ፡ ደመ ፡ ለትደምሰስ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ነፍስ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ሕዝባ ።

translations.lxx: Every soul that shall eat blood, that soul shall perish from his people.
translations.kjv: Whatsoever soul it be that eateth any manner of blood, even that soul shall be cut off from his people.

verses.geez: ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.geez:
ንግሮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወበሎሙ ፡ ዘያመጽእ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ መድኀኒት ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ያመጽእ ፡ ቍርባኖ ፡
                  ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ውስተ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ መድኀኒቱ ።

translations.lxx: Thou shalt also speak to the children of Israel, saying, He that offers a sacrifice of peace-offering, shall bring his gift to the Lord also from the sacrifice of peace-offering.
translations.kjv: Speak unto the children of Israel, saying, He that offereth the sacrifice of his peace offerings unto the LORD shall bring his oblation unto the LORD of the sacrifice of his peace offerings.

verses.geez:
እደዊሁ ፡ ያመጽእ ፡ መሥዋዕቶ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፤ ሥብሐ ፡ ተላዕ ፡ ወከብዶ ፡ እንተ ፡ ትንእስ ፡ ያመጽእ ፡ ከመ ፡
                  ይሢም ፡ ቍርባኖ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: His hands shall bring the burnt-offerings to the Lord; the fat which is on the breast and the lobe of the liver, he shall bring them, so as to set them for a gift before the Lord.
translations.kjv: His own hands shall bring the offerings of the LORD made by fire, the fat with the breast, it shall he bring, that the breast may be waved for a wave offering before the LORD.

verses.geez: ወይወድዮ ፡ ካህን ፡ ለሥብሐ ፡ ተላዕ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምሥዋዕ ፡ ወተላዑሰ ፡ ይኩን ፡ ለአሮን ፡ ወለደቂቁ ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall offer the fat upon the altar, and the breast shall be Aaron's and his sons,
translations.kjv: And the priest shall burn the fat upon the altar: but the breast shall be Aaron’s and his sons’.

verses.geez: ወአገደሁ ፡ ዘየማን ፡ ይሁብ ፡ ሀብተ ፡ ለካህን ፡ እምውስተ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ መድኀኒትክሙ ።

translations.lxx: and ye shall give the right shoulder for a choice piece to the priest of your sacrifices of peace-offering.
translations.kjv: And the right shoulder shall ye give unto the priest for an heave offering of the sacrifices of your peace offerings.

verses.geez: ዘያመጽእ ፡ ደመ ፡ መድኀኒቱ ፡ ወሥብሖኒ ፡ ዘእምውስተ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ አሮን ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ አገዳ ፡ ዘየማን ፡ ክፍሉ ።

translations.lxx: He that offers the blood of the peace-offering, and the fat, of the sons of Aaron, his shall be the right shoulder for a portion.
translations.kjv: He among the sons of Aaron, that offereth the blood of the peace offerings, and the fat, shall have the right shoulder for his part.

verses.geez:
እስመ ፡ ተላዕ ፡ ዘሀብት ፡ ወአገዳ ፡ ዘየማን ፡ ነሣእኩ ፡ እምደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እምውስተ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ መድኀኒትክሙ
                  ፡ ወወሀብኩ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ ካህን ፡ ወለደቂቁ ፡ ይኩኖሙ ፡ ሕገ ፡ ዘለዓለም ፡ እምነ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: For I have taken the wave-breast and shoulder of separation from the children of Israel from the sacrifices of your peace-offerings, and I have given them to Aaron the priest and his sons, a perpetual ordinance due from the children of Israel.
translations.kjv: For the wave breast and the heave shoulder have I taken of the children of Israel from off the sacrifices of their peace offerings, and have given them unto Aaron the priest and unto his sons by a statute for ever from among the children of Israel.

verses.geez:
ዝንቱ ፡ ክፍሉ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ ወለደቂቁ ፡ እምነ ፡ መሥዋዕቱ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ እምአመ ፡ ይመጽኡ ፡ ይኩኑ ፡ ካህነ ፡
                  ለእግዚአብሔር ፤

translations.lxx: This is the anointing of Aaron, and the anointing of his sons, their portion of the burnt-offerings of the Lord, in the day in which he brought them forward to minister as priests to the Lord;
translations.kjv: This is the portion of the anointing of Aaron, and of the anointing of his sons, out of the offerings of the LORD made by fire, in the day when he presented them to minister unto the LORD in the priest’s office;

verses.geez:
በከመ ፡ አዘዞ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ የሀብዎሙ ፡ እምአመ ፡ ቀብእዎሙ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወይኩኖሙ ፡ ሕገ ፡
                  ዘለዓለም ፡ በመዋዕሎሙ ።

translations.lxx: as the Lord commanded to give to them in the day in which he anointed them of the sons of Israel, a perpetual statute through their generations.
translations.kjv: Which the LORD commanded to be given them of the children of Israel, in the day that he anointed them, by a statute for ever throughout their generations.

verses.geez:
ዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ሕጉ ፡ ለቍርባን ፡ ወለመሥዋዕት ፡ ለዘበእንተ ፡ ኀጢአትኒ ፡ ወለዘበእንተ ፡ ንስሓኒ ፡ ወለፍጻሜሁኒ ፡
                  ወለመሥዋዕተ ፡ መድኀኒትኒ ፤

translations.lxx: This is the law of the whole-burnt-offerings, and of sacrifice, and of sin-offering, and of offering for transgression, and of the sacrifice of consecration, and of the sacrifice of peace-offering;
translations.kjv: This is the law of the burnt offering, of the meat offering, and of the sin offering, and of the trespass offering, and of the consecrations, and of the sacrifice of the peace offerings;

verses.geez:
በከመ ፡ አዘዞ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ በደብረ ፡ ሲና ፡ በዕለተ ፡ አዘዞሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡
                  ያብኡ ፡ ቍርባኖሙ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በገዳም ፡ ዘሲና ።

translations.lxx: as the Lord commanded Moses in the mount Sina, in the day in which he commanded the children of Israel to offer their gifts before the Lord in the wilderness of Sina.
translations.kjv: Which the LORD commanded Moses in mount Sinai, in the day that he commanded the children of Israel to offer their oblations unto the LORD, in the wilderness of Sinai.
